## Summary

What does this PR do, in one paragraph?

## Type of change

- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] New command on existing plugin
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Core abstraction (router/notifier/AI/scheduler/...)
- [ ] Docs / packaging / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `main`
- [ ] No secrets in code or examples
- [ ] No personal data, hostnames, or hardcoded IPs leaked
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] If plugin uses AI: every call gated by `self.ai.is_available()`
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] Tested locally (`netsentry start` runs without errors)

## Reproduction / test plan

How did you verify this works?
